entry.title: IDC SAQMPD06C1072 (M033) awarded to HAYNES INCORPORATED, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: BUREAU OF COMPTROLLER AND GLOBAL FINANCE SERVICES

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION IS ISSUED IN ORDER TO EXCERCISE OPTION YEAR NINE (9) DURING THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE OF 01/01/2016 THROUGH 12/31/2016. THIS MODIFICATION ALSO INCORPORATE WAGE DETERMINATION TABLE(S) 2005-2473 REV 18 CHARLESTON, SC AND 2005-2103 REV 16 INCLUGING THE NEW HOURLY RATES. IGF::OT:IGF

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:extentCompeted.description: FULL AND OPEN COMPETITION AFTER EXCLUSION OF SOURCES

entry.title: IDC SAQMPD06C1072 (M035) awarded to HAYNES INCORPORATED, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THIS MODIFICATION IS ISSUED IN ORDER TO EXTEND THE SERVICES OF THE CONTRACT FOR (8) MONTHS BEGINNING JANUARY 01, 2017 THROUGH AUGUST 31, 2017 INCORPORATING THE NEW RATES FOR CHARLESTON, SC&WASHINGTON, DC (SEE ATTACHED SHEETS)
THIS MODIFICATION IS ISSUED IN ORDER TO ADD LOCATION OF GREECE FOR FINANCIAL ANALYST. THE RATE SHALL BE $51.43 PER HOUR DURING THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE OF 01-01-17 THROUGH 08/31/17.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:extentCompeted.description: FULL AND OPEN COMPETITION AFTER EXCLUSION OF SOURCES

entry.title: IDC SAQMPD06C1072 (M037) awarded to HAYNES INCORPORATED, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THIS MODIFICATION IS ISSUED IN ORDER TO ADD LOCATION OF GREECE FOR FINANCIAL ANALYST. THE RATE SHALL BE $51.43 PER HOUR DURING THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE OF 01-01-2017 THROUGH 08-31-2017.
THIS MODIFICATION IS ISSUED IN ORDER TO ADD CRYPTO CUSTODIAN TO THE CONTRACT STATED IN BLOCK 10A ABOVE. PLEASE REFER TO ATTACHED STATEMENT OF WORK (SOW).

entry.title: IDC SAQMPD06C1072 (M038) awarded to HAYNES INCORPORATED, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THIS MODIFICATION IS ISSUED IN ORDER TO ADD LOCATION OF GREECE FOR FINANCIAL ANALYST. THE RATE SHALL BE $51.43 PER HOUR DURING THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE OF 01-01-2017 THROUGH 08-31-2017.
THIS MODIFICATION IS ISSUED IN ORDER TO ADD CRYPTO CUSTODIAN TO THE CONTRACT STATED IN BLOCK 10A ABOVE. PLEASE REFER TO ATTACHED STATEMENT OF WORK (SOW).
THE CONTRACT HAS BEEN EXTENDED FOR ONE YEAR DURING THE PERIOD OF SEPTEMBER 01, 2017 THROUGH AUGUST 31, 2018.
